judgment.summary: Profitable, growing financial services firm trading at reasonable multiples with strong analyst support.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus EPS by 7.2%; next earnings date is 2026-07-24.
positives: Revenue growth 11.6% YoY and earnings growth 17.6% YoY indicate robust business expansion.
Profit margin 16.3% and return on equity 34.4% demonstrate strong profitability and efficient capital use.
Forward P/E 15.24x is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 19.13x, suggesting growth is priced in.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 23 analysts with a mean target price of $360.37.
Strong liquidity with current ratio 1.57 and quick ratio 1.56.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 177.85% is high, indicating significant leverage.
Free cash flow data is not available (n/a).
PEG ratio of 1.52 suggests growth may be partially priced in.

news.paragraph: American Express reported a solid first quarter, beating EPS estimates by over 7% and showing strong double-digit growth in revenue and earnings. The company also reiterated its full-year guidance, indicating management's confidence in continued performance. With a consensus 'buy' rating from analysts and a mean target price suggesting upside potential, the stock heads into its next earnings report on July 24th on firm footing.
